title: Refactor: Consolidate duplicate code in data processors
original_text: Refactored duplicate code in the data processing modules. Found that CSV and JSON processors had nearly identical parsing logic. Extracted the common logic into a base DataProcessor class in utils/data_processor.py. Both CSV and JSON processors now inherit from this base class. Reduced code duplication by 40%. Added tests for the base class. Result: 47 tests pass.
expected_body_lines: - Extract common logic into DataProcessor base class
- Make CSV and JSON processors inherit from base class
- Add tests for base DataProcessor class
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(data): consolidate duplicate parsing logic"
